rows.src_en: Send a structured conversation to a Claude model and receive a response. Compatible with the Anthropic Messages API.
rows.desc_en: Send a structured, multi-turn conversation to a Claude model and get its response. Compatible with the Anthropic Messages API; supports tool use, extended thinking, streaming, and fine-grained sampling controls.
rows.title_zh: 向 Claude 模型发送结构化的多轮对话并获取应答。兼容 Anthropic Messages API,支持工具调用、扩展思考、流式输出与细粒度采样控制。

rows.src_en: Claude model identifier. Examples: claude-opus-4-7, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001.
rows.desc_en: Which Claude model to run.
rows.title_zh: 本次调用使用的 Claude 模型。

rows.src_en: Maximum number of tokens to generate before stopping.
rows.desc_en: Upper bound on how many tokens the model may generate before it is forced to stop. The model can stop earlier on its own.
rows.title_zh: 模型在被强制停止前最多可生成的 token 数。模型也可能提前自行停止。

rows.desc_en: The ordered conversation turns. Alternate user and assistant turns to supply prior context; the model continues from the last turn.
rows.title_zh: 有序的对话轮次。以用户与助手轮次交替提供既往上下文,模型从最后一轮接续生成。

rows.desc_en: Who authored the turn, distinguishing user input from prior assistant output.
rows.title_zh: 该轮的作者身份,用于区分用户输入与助手既往输出。

rows.src_en: String or array of content blocks.
rows.desc_en: The turn's content, given either as plain text or as an array of structured content blocks (for example text plus images or tool results).
rows.title_zh: 该轮的内容,可以是纯文本,也可以是一组结构化内容块(例如文本搭配图像或工具结果)。

rows.src_en: System prompt. String or array of text blocks.
rows.desc_en: A top-level system prompt that frames the model's behavior across the whole conversation, given as text or as an array of text blocks.
rows.title_zh: 顶层系统提示,用于框定模型在整段对话中的行为,可为文本或一组文本块。

rows.desc_en: Controls output randomness; lower values make replies more focused and deterministic, higher values make them more varied. Tune either this or `top_p`, not both.
rows.title_zh: 控制输出的随机性;取值越低应答越聚焦、越确定,越高则越多样。请在本参数与 `top_p` 之间二选一调节,不要同时调。

rows.src_en: Nucleus sampling. Use instead of temperature.
rows.desc_en: Nucleus sampling: the model samples only from the most probable tokens whose cumulative probability reaches this threshold. Use as an alternative to `temperature`.
rows.title_zh: 核采样:模型仅从累计概率达到该阈值的最高概率 token 中采样。作为 `temperature` 的替代方案使用。

rows.src_en: Only sample from the top K options for each token.
rows.desc_en: Limits sampling to the K most likely tokens at each step, removing long-tail low-probability options.
rows.title_zh: 将每一步的采样限制在概率最高的 K 个 token 内,剔除长尾低概率选项。

rows.desc_en: Custom text sequences that, once produced, immediately halt generation.
rows.title_zh: 自定义文本序列,一旦被生成即立刻停止本次生成。

rows.desc_en: Whether to stream the response incrementally over server-sent events instead of returning it all at once.
rows.title_zh: 是否以服务器发送事件(SSE)增量流式返回应答,而非一次性返回全部内容。

rows.desc_en: The set of tools the model is allowed to call during the turn.
rows.title_zh: 本轮允许模型调用的工具集合。

rows.desc_en: The tool's name, by which the model refers to it when calling.
rows.title_zh: 工具名称,模型调用时以此引用该工具。

rows.desc_en: Explanation of what the tool does, which the model reads to decide when and how to call it.
rows.title_zh: 对工具用途的说明,模型据此判断何时、如何调用。

rows.desc_en: JSON Schema describing the arguments the tool accepts, used to validate and shape the model's tool calls.
rows.title_zh: 描述工具入参的 JSON Schema,用于校验并规范模型的工具调用。

rows.desc_en: The kind of tool, distinguishing a custom-defined tool from other supported tool types.
rows.title_zh: 工具类别,用于区分自定义工具与其他受支持的工具类型。

rows.desc_en: Governs whether and how the model is allowed to invoke the supplied tools on this turn.
rows.title_zh: 约束本轮模型是否以及如何调用所提供的工具。

rows.desc_en: The tool-use strategy: let the model decide, require it to use some tool, force a specific named tool, or forbid tool use entirely.
rows.title_zh: 工具使用策略:让模型自行决定、要求其必须使用某个工具、强制使用某个指定工具,或完全禁止使用工具。

rows.desc_en: The specific tool to force, used when the strategy targets a single named tool.
rows.title_zh: 要强制使用的具体工具,在策略指向单个指定工具时使用。

rows.desc_en: When set, restricts the model to one tool call at a time instead of issuing several in parallel.
rows.title_zh: 开启后,限制模型每次只发起一个工具调用,而非并行发起多个。

rows.src_en: Enable extended thinking for complex reasoning.
rows.desc_en: Enables extended thinking, giving the model room to reason internally before answering complex problems.
rows.title_zh: 启用扩展思考,让模型在应答复杂问题前进行更充分的内部推理。

rows.desc_en: Switch that turns extended thinking on.
rows.title_zh: 用于开启扩展思考的开关。

rows.desc_en: Token allowance set aside for the model's internal reasoning.
rows.title_zh: 为模型内部推理预留的 token 额度。

rows.desc_en: How the thinking trace is surfaced in the response: returned as a summary, or omitted from the output.
rows.title_zh: 思考过程在响应中的呈现方式:以摘要形式返回,或从输出中略去。

rows.desc_en: Optional request metadata used for tracking and analytics.
rows.title_zh: 可选的请求元数据,用于追踪与分析。

rows.desc_en: An opaque identifier for the end user driving the request; must not contain personally identifiable information.
rows.title_zh: 标识发起请求的终端用户的不透明 ID,不得包含个人可识别信息。

rows.desc_en: Selects the service tier for the request, trading off automatic capacity selection against pinning to standard capacity only.
rows.title_zh: 为请求选择服务层级,在自动选择容量与仅锁定标准容量之间权衡。

rows.desc_en: Unique identifier of the generated message.
rows.title_zh: 生成消息的唯一标识。

rows.desc_en: Object type of the payload.
rows.title_zh: 载荷的对象类型。

rows.desc_en: Author role of the response, the assistant.
rows.title_zh: 应答的作者角色,即助手。

rows.src_en: Response content blocks (text, tool_use, thinking, etc.).
rows.desc_en: The response body as a sequence of content blocks, which may include text, tool-use requests, or thinking output.
rows.title_zh: 以一系列内容块组成的应答正文,可能包含文本、工具调用请求或思考输出。

rows.desc_en: The model that produced the response.
rows.title_zh: 产生该应答的模型。

rows.desc_en: Why generation ended: a natural end of turn, hitting a stop sequence, reaching the token cap, or pausing to call a tool.
rows.title_zh: 生成结束的原因:自然结束本轮、命中停止序列、达到 token 上限,或为调用工具而暂停。

rows.desc_en: The specific stop sequence that triggered the stop, when generation ended for that reason.
rows.title_zh: 当因停止序列而结束时,触发停止的那个具体序列。

rows.desc_en: Token accounting for the request, including prompt-cache reads and writes.
rows.title_zh: 本次请求的 token 计量,含提示缓存的读取与写入。

rows.desc_en: Tokens consumed by the input.
rows.title_zh: 输入消耗的 token 数。

rows.desc_en: Tokens produced in the output.
rows.title_zh: 输出生成的 token 数。

rows.desc_en: Input tokens used to write new entries into the prompt cache.
rows.title_zh: 用于向提示缓存写入新条目的输入 token 数。

rows.desc_en: Input tokens served from the prompt cache rather than recomputed.
rows.title_zh: 从提示缓存命中读取、而非重新计算的输入 token 数。
